name: Macadamia Nut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch-square baking pan.
2. Line the bottom of the pan with foil.
3. In a large bowl, combine butter, chocolate chips, macadamia nuts, unsweetened chocolate, and vanilla extract.
4. Attach a candy thermometer to a medium saucepan.
5. Add sugar, evaporated milk, and marshmallows to the saucepan.
6. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
7. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches 238°F (114°C).
8. Pour hot mixture into the bowl and let stand for 30 minutes.
9. Stir until the mixture begins to thicken, about 1 minute.
10. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
11. Let stand until completely cooled.
12. Cover with foil and let stand overnight to allow flavors to mellow.
13. Invert fudge and remove foil.
14. Reinvert and cut into squares.
15. Store at room temperature in an airtight container. Makes about 2 pounds.
